prompt: We need to add a departments table and link employees to departments. Create Flyway migration V6__Create_Departments_Table.sql with columns: id (UUID), name (VARCHAR 100), code (VARCHAR 20), created_at, updated_at. Then add department_id (UUID, FK to departments) to the employees table. Also create a Department entity, DepartmentRepository, and DepartmentService with basic CRUD.
assertions: docs/database/Readme.md has departments table documented and V6 migration listed
docs/database/Readme.md shows department_id column in employees table
docs/changelog/ has an entry for this session
docs/features/departments/Readme.md exists describing the department CRUD feature
